expectations.text: Skill adapts question count to request complexity — does not force all 7 phases for a casual request
expectations.evidence: Triage correctly selected Explore Mode. Only 3 discovery questions before generating ideas (vs 11 in old skill). No forced phases — went Receive+QuickGoal → Constraints → Generate → Narrow.

expectations.text: Final output includes concrete project ideas, not just a refined prompt
expectations.evidence: Generated 7 concrete ideas across 3 themes (Developer Tools, Personal Pain Points, Niche SaaS). Each has description, why-it-fits, and challenges. Then went deeper on user's choice with actionable strategy including Quick Wins/Medium-Term/Longer-Term.

expectations.text: Uses casual, accessible language matching the user's tone — no unnecessary jargon
expectations.evidence: Maintained casual Thai throughout. Used terms the user would know (cron, serverless, CLI, freemium). Didn't over-explain technical concepts.

expectations.text: Total questions asked across all phases is 8 or fewer
expectations.evidence: 5 total questions: 1 Quick Goal + 2 Constraints + 1 Narrow + 1 Focused follow-up. Well under the 8 limit.
